mapper.select:
SELECT r.room_id,
CASE WHEN r.user1_id = #{user_id} THEN r.user2_id ELSE r.user1_id END AS other_user_id,
u.nickname AS other_user_name, u.grade_id AS other_user_grade_id, u.profile_filename AS other_user_profile,
m.content AS last_msg, m.msg_type AS last_msg_type, m.created_at AS created_at,
( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT msg.group_id) FROM tbl_msg msg WHERE msg.room_id = r.room_id AND msg.sender_id != #{user_id} AND msg.msg_id > NVL(cru.last_read_msg_id,0) AND msg.is_active = 'Y' ) AS unread_count
FROM tbl_room r
JOIN tbl_chat_room_user cru ON cru.room_id = r.room_id AND cru.user_id = #{user_id}
JOIN tbl_user u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN r.user1_id = #{user_id} THEN r.user2_id ELSE r.user1_id END
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT msg.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY msg.room_id ORDER BY msg.created_at DESC, msg.msg_id DESC ) rn FROM tbl_msg msg ) WHERE rn = 1 ) m ON m.room_id = r.room_id
WHERE r.user1_id = #{user_id} OR r.user2_id = #{user_id}
ORDER BY m.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, m.msg_id DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN user1_id = #{sender_id} THEN user2_id ELSE user1_id END FROM tbl_room WHERE room_id = #{room_id}
